refinementLevels.description: 2x2 structured mesh, SymmetricAnsatz seed, GaussNewton, first-order-shiab branch
4x4 structured mesh, SymmetricAnsatz seed, GaussNewton, first-order-shiab branch
8x8 structured mesh, SymmetricAnsatz seed, GaussNewton, first-order-shiab branch

notes: Phase XI nontrivial direct solver-backed refinement ladder for the paired first-order-shiab path. Uses GaussNewton solver with SymmetricAnsatz seeds to produce non-zero admitted backgrounds on each refinement level. Residual, stationarity, objective, and gauge-violation are non-constant across levels. This ladder is distinct from the Phase X zero-invariant direct control ladder (phase10_direct_refinement_first_order) and from the bridge-derived ladder.
